justification: The question asks for a prediction regarding the future stock price of Omnicom Group Inc. (OMC) on a specific date compared to a baseline price.
question:
Will OMC's market close price on each resolution date listed below be higher than its market close price on 2025-05-11?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
